scene_description:
**Foreground:**  
- The road surface is asphalt with a white dashed center line. On the left edge, a solid white line marks the road’s boundary, followed by a narrow strip of green grass and a gravel shoulder. On the right edge, a solid white line marks the boundary, then a gravel shoulder and a strip of green grass beyond the gravel.  

**Mid-foreground to Background:**  
- The road extends straight into the distance with a white dashed center line. A metal guardrail (silver, wavy profile) runs parallel to the road on the left, starting in the mid-foreground and continuing to the background. Another identical metal guardrail runs parallel on the right, also from the mid-foreground to the background.  
- **Left side (beyond guardrail):** Dense forest with tall coniferous trees (dark green foliage, straight trunks) and scattered deciduous trees with white bark (birch). Green undergrowth is visible at the tree bases.  
- **Right side (beyond guardrail):** A mix of tall coniferous trees (some with sparse foliage or dead trunks), green grass, and low underbrush. A tall lattice steel utility pole is partially visible in the background, behind the trees.  

**Background:**  
- The road continues straight, with tree lines converging at the horizon. The sky is overcast and light gray. No buildings, vehicles, or signs are visible. The terrain is flat throughout.  

**Text & Signs:** None visible.  
**Infrastructure:** Metal guardrails (left and right, mid-foreground to background); a tall lattice steel utility pole (right background).  
**Vehicles & Plates:** No vehicles present.  
**Road Surface & Markings:** Asphalt road with white solid edge lines and a white dashed center line; gravel shoulders on both sides.  
**Buildings & Architecture:** No buildings or structures visible.  
**Vegetation & Terrain:** Dense coniferous (pines) and scattered deciduous (birch) trees on both sides; flat terrain with green grass and underbrush.

details.name: lattice steel utility pole
details.reason: Lattice steel poles are characteristic of specific regions like parts of Eastern Europe or North America.
details.focused_description: The lattice steel utility pole is a tall, vertical structure with a crisscross lattice framework of steel members. It appears to be dark gray in color, constructed from steel, with a cylindrical form defined by the intersecting lattice pattern. No visible text or markings are present on the pole in the image. The pole's condition is upright, though the image is blurred, obscuring finer details of wear or damage.

details.name: metal guardrail
details.reason: The wavy profile of the guardrail can help identify certain road standards.
details.focused_description: A metal guardrail consisting of a series of vertical posts connected by horizontal rails, running parallel to the road. The guardrail is gray in color, made of metal, and appears to be in good condition with no visible damage. It has a linear shape extending along the side of the road.
